No Poverty.reason: No explicit or strong inferred evidence in the course syllabus links investment banking directly to poverty eradication.

Zero Hunger.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to ending hunger or food security.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to health and well-being.

Quality Education.reason: The course provides tertiary education and skills for employment (Targets 4.3, 4.4) and explicitly teaches sustainable development through '永續金融專題' (Target 4.7).

Gender Equality.reason: While 'social responsibility' is mentioned, there is no explicit evidence or strong inference linking the course content to specific gender equality targets.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to clean water and sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: The '永續金融專題' (Sustainable Finance Special Topic) implies financing for clean energy projects, aligning with Target 7.a.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course's core focus on capital markets, IPOs, M&A, and financial services directly drives economic growth and strengthens financial institutions (Targets 8.2, 8.10), fostering decent job creation.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The '銀行業務風險管理' (Bank business risk management) topic has a minimal, inferred link to improving financial market regulation (Target 10.5).

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to sustainable cities or communities.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: The '永續金融專題' and '永續議題' core competency directly encourage companies to adopt sustainable practices and integrate sustainability information (Target 12.6).

Climate Action.reason: The '永續金融專題' (Sustainable Finance Special Topic) directly relates to mobilizing finance for climate action, aligning with Targets 13.2 and 13.a.

Life Below Water.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to marine ecosystems or life below water.

Life on Land.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to terrestrial ecosystems or life on land.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The '銀行業務風險管理' (Bank business risk management) topic contributes to developing accountable and transparent financial institutions (Target 16.6).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course is explicitly a '合作課程' (cooperation course) through '產學合作' (industry-academia cooperation), directly exemplifying multi-stakeholder partnerships (Target 17.17).
